title: 3 Perfect Platform Days at Dreamforce
author: Mike Melone

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Dreamforceis more than just a conference‌ — it’s an opportunity to connect, learn, and be inspired. With so much to do, it can be overwhelming to plan your days. That’s why our Platform Team has put together an itinerary to help you make the most of your time and dive deep into all thingsAgentforce 360 Platform.

sections.heading: Day 1, Tuesday, Oct 14: Get Inspired and Go Hands-On
sections.text: Start your day by attending theDreamforce Main Keynotewith Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff. This is a can’t-miss event where Marc always makes big announcements and features surprise guests. Be prepared to be wowed and get a glimpse of the future of the Salesforce ecosystem. Add the Main Keynote to yourDreamforce agendaor stream it virtually onSalesforce+. After the keynote, it’s time to choose your own adventure. Head to the Trailblazer Forest to get hands-on with new products and meet fellow Trailblazers. Make sure to visit both Platform Park to see our latest developer tools, and the Trust Zone to learn about our security and privacy products. One of the sessions we recommend most on day one is the Admin Keynote, where you can learn how Salesforce Admins power the Agentic Enterprise by building and customizing agents, configuring the agentic platform, and safeguarding trust. If you’re attending Dreamforce in person, make sure youadd the Admin Keynote to your agendaor catch the session as it’s streamed onSalesforce+. On day one, you’ll also be able to attend your choice of more a dozen Platform sessions related to devops and security. Whether you’re an IT business leader, developer, administrator, or architect, there’s something for everyone. To plan your schedule,view a complete list of Platform sessionsfor all three days, or scroll down for our detailed daily breakdown. Tuesday, Oct 14 | 8:30 AM – 9:15 AM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Room 3022 (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 1:15 PM – 2:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15) Unpack the latest security innovations across Salesforce Shield and Security Center. Enhance security for both humans and agents, while getting next-level visibility into access, activity, and more. Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 9:00 AM – 9:20 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater Test, analyze & optimize performance. Explore a comprehensive testing & deployment strategy using Sandboxes, Agentforce Testing Center, Scale Test, Scale Center & ApexGuru for scalable AI solutions. Role:Administrator, Developer Tuesday, Oct 14 | 12:30 PM – 1:15 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15 Hear how IT leaders empower teams to build, test, and ship Agentforce quickly, securely, and at scale with ALM. Discover best practices for products like DevOps Center, Sandboxes, and Agentforce Builder. Role:Developer, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater Learn how you can build accurate Agentforce agents, run automated tests with Agentforce Testing Center and DevOps Testing, and release with DevOps Center. Role:Architect, Developer Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM PDT | Moscone North, LL, Campground, SF on SF Theater (Also on Thursday, Oct 16| 12:15 PM – 1:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15) Discover agent lifecycle management (ALM) best practices: see how our internal teams use Sandboxes, Agentforce Testing Center, and Agentforce Vibes to securely build, test, and deploy AI agents. Role:Developer, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:30 PM – 1:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Slack and Apps Lab Theater (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 8:30 AM – 8:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater) Safeguard critical data with Salesforce data loss prevention tools. Learn how to strengthen your security posture faster, detect a broader range of risky activities, and investigate exposures quickly. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:45 PM – 2:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Room 3018 (Also available to watch onSalesforce+) In the event your data is lost or corrupted, how will you know and what can you do? Learn how to back up your data, archive inactive records, manage privacy requests, and mask or seed data. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 9:30 AM – 9:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Theater 19) Accelerate development with automated data masking and seeding in Sandboxes for faster, safer releases. Discover innovations for building better apps, agents and Data 360 experiences. Role:Administrator, Developer Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater (Also on Thursday, Oct 16| 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater) Unlock the full potential of Salesforce Shield with implementation best practices. We’ll guide you step by step to configure Shield effectively and efficiently, and ensure your data is protected. Role:Administrator, Architect Tuesday, Oct 14 | 4:15 PM – 5:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7 (Also on Thursday, Oct 16| 2:45 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15) Master trust in the agentic era. Dive into our security and privacy roadmap while learning how we’re bringing the best of Agentforce to key products like Security Center and Privacy Center. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 12:30 PM – 1:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 1 (Also on Thursday, Oct 16| 11:30 AM – 12:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 5) Join an expert-guided peer discussion for deep insights into Salesforce security. Exchange strategies for navigating challenges, protecting data, and ensuring resilience. Gain actionable advice. Role: Administrator, Developer, IT Business Leader Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 4 (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 11:00 AM – 12:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 3) Join our expert-led discussions to learn best practices for your app lifecycle management. Hear challenges and solutions from fellow IT professionals in building and governing applications and agents. Role:Developer, IT Business Leader Unwind and network at the Dreamforce welcome reception from 5:00 p.m.–6:00 p.m. in Dreampark, Trailblazer Forest, and Moscone South for some music, refreshments, fun, and networking. The Platform Team will also be hosting our ownSip & Savor Happy Hourat Local Edition in San Francisco from 5:00-7:00 pm. Feel free to drop by and say hi!

inline_links.text: add the Admin Keynote to your agenda
view a complete list of Platform sessions

sections.heading: Day 2, Wednesday Oct, 15 : Become an Agentic Enterprise
sections.text: Day two starts with a bang at the Agentforce Keynote, where you’ll learn how to turn to vision into reality when it comes to becoming an agentic enterprise. From there, make your way to the Salesforce-on-Salesforce Zone, located in the Campground. Stop by the Platform booth to dive into demos, talk to sponsors, and hear incredible customer stories. The learning continues on Wednesday with theDeveloper Keynote: Build Your Agentic Enterprise from 2 p.m.–2:50 p.m. PT. Discover new developer tools to build the future of apps with AI and data. Plus, learn how to build your Agentic Enterprise with Agentforce, Data 360, Slack, and the deeply unified Agentforce 360 Platform. Add theDeveloper Keynoteto your agenda orwatch on Salesforce+. Wednesday, Oct 15 | 9:30 AM – 9:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater Meet Agentforce in Privacy Center. Effortlessly navigate data privacy regulations by identifying policy gaps, translating them into recommended actions and providing simple remediation. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader Wednesday, Oct 15 | 10:30 AM – 10:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater Introducing your new AI-powered security assistant. Learn how to use Agentforce to quickly assess risks, investigate incidents, and strengthen your security posture — no security expertise required. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader Wednesday, Oct 15 | 11:15 AM – 12:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 8 Hear directly about real SaaS security challenges, gaps, and solutions from security leaders. Learn how AI and DevSecOps help transform SaaS into a secure, agile environment. Role: IT Business Leader Wednesday, Oct 15 | 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone South, LL, Content Pavilion, Stage 1 (Also available to watch onSalesforce+) Discover how purpose-built solutions empower organizations to master regulatory compliance through streamlined data management, robust audit logs, and enterprise-grade data encryption. Role:Administrator Wednesday, Oct 15 | 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 2:00 PM – 2:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater) Strengthen data lifecycle management and protect your data from daily vulnerabilities with Salesforce Backup & Recover (formerly Own Recover) and Salesforce Archive. Role:Administrator Wednesday, Oct 15 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater Discover how Event Monitoring offers real-time insights to boost product adoption. Learn best practices to track your Salesforce investment, including application performance and user engagement. Role:Administrator, IT Business Leader, Sales Wednesday, Oct 15 | 3:00 PM – 3:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2000 (Also available to watch onSalesforce+) Learn Salesforce’s five-stage ALM process for AI-powered agents and apps. Discover our tools to plan, build, test, deploy & observe with governance baked in to reduce risk and accelerate innovation. Role:Developer, IT Business Leader Wednesday, Oct 15 |3:45 PM – 4:30 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7 Also being shown Thursday, Oct 16 | 11:00 AM – 11:45 AM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7 Explore new tools to enhance your developer experience. Salesforce product managers will share the roadmap for agents, MCP, vibe coding, and answer questions in this interactive session. Role:Administrator, Developer Wednesday, Oct 15 | 4:15 PM – 5:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Room 3024 Learn how to quickly and effectively build and deploy AI agents on the Agentforce 360 Platform. Hear about the future of creating agentic experiences with AI-powered low-code and pro-code tools. Role:Developer Wednesday, Oct 15 | 8:00 AM – 9:00 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2010 (Also on Thursday, Oct 16| 3:00 PM – 4:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2012) Elevate your Application & Agent Lifecycle Management (ALM) with quality and security. Discover how Sandboxes, Agentforce Vibes, and Scale Test empower your developers to build and test quickly. Role:Developer, IT Business Leader Wednesday, Oct 15 | 8:00 AM – 9:00 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 7 (Also on Wednesday, Oct 15| 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 6) Join peers to discuss how to secure and protect your data in the agentic era. Share insights and best practices on data protection and secure development, especially for AI adoption. Role:Administrator, Architect The day culminates with the legendary Dreamfest, benefiting UCSF Benioff Children’s Hospitals. Enjoy Metallica at Chase Center or Benson Boone at Bayfront Park.

sections.heading: Day 3, Thursday, Oct 16: The Final Stretch
sections.text: Start your final day with thePlatform Power-Up Breakfastin the Dreamforce Lounges starting at 7:30 a.m. While you’re there, be sure to stop by our “Ask the Experts” booth to get all your questions answered by Salesforce professionals. Then, at 9 a.m. in Moscone West Level 3 Keynote Hall, check out theIT Keynote, “Build and Govern the Agentic Enterprise”, learn how to build and secure Agentforce and agentic apps on Salesforce with new agent-first DevOps and governance tools. Add the IT Keynote to your agenda,watch on Salesforce+, orstream on LinkedIn. After a stop at the Campground and some lunch, be sure to check out ourSecurity Keynote, “Protecting the Agentic Enterprise”, at 1:30 p.m. on Moscone Hall A. You’ll hear from Okta CEO Todd McKinnon and Salesforce’s Chief Trust Officer on how the threat landscape is evolving and how you can protect your agentic enterprise. In addition to the Security Keynote, there are several other Platform sessions to wrap up the final day: Add the Security Keynote to your agendaorstream on LinkedIn. Thursday, Oct 16 | 11:30 AM – 11:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2000 (Also available to watch onSalesforce+) Learn how the new Salesforce security data fabric aggregates and correlates security data, enabling organizations to identify, understand, and respond to security threats more effectively. Role:Administrator, Architect Thursday, Oct 16 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone South, LL, Content Pavilion, Stage 4 (Also available to watch onSalesforce+) See new AI developer tools and integrations to build smart apps. Learn how to speed up DevOps with Agentforce Vibes and low-code change management tools. Role:Administrator, Developer Head back to the Campground or Trailblazer Forest for any last-minute learning or to revisit your favorite booths. Before you know it, it’s time to exhale and relax. You did it! Travel home safely with a head full of new knowledge and a heart full of inspiration. See you at Dreamforce 2026!

existing_ctas.heading: Plan your Dreamforce experience today
existing_ctas.body: With more than 1,500 sessions over three days, maximize your time by creating a schedule that suits your needs.

raw_html:
Dreamforce is more than just a conference‌ — it’s an opportunity to connect, learn, and be inspired. With so much to do, it can be overwhelming to plan your days. That’s why our Platform Team has put together an itinerary to help you make the most of your time and dive deep into all things Agentforce 360 Platform.

Day 1, Tuesday, Oct 14: Get Inspired and Go Hands-On

Morning: Kick off With the Keynote

Start your day by attending the Dreamforce Main Keynote with Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff. This is a can’t-miss event where Marc always makes big announcements and features surprise guests. Be prepared to be wowed and get a glimpse of the future of the Salesforce ecosystem. Add the Main Keynote to your Dreamforce agenda or stream it virtually on Salesforce+.

Afternoon: Deep Dive into the Platform

After the keynote, it’s time to choose your own adventure. Head to the Trailblazer Forest to get hands-on with new products and meet fellow Trailblazers. Make sure to visit both Platform Park to see our latest developer tools, and the Trust Zone to learn about our security and privacy products.

One of the sessions we recommend most on day one is the Admin Keynote, where you can learn how Salesforce Admins power the Agentic Enterprise by building and customizing agents, configuring the agentic platform, and safeguarding trust. If you’re attending Dreamforce in person, make sure you add the Admin Keynote to your agenda or catch the session as it’s streamed on Salesforce+.

On day one, you’ll also be able to attend your choice of more a dozen Platform sessions related to devops and security. Whether you’re an IT business leader, developer, administrator, or architect, there’s something for everyone.

To plan your schedule, view a complete list of Platform sessions for all three days, or scroll down for our detailed daily breakdown.

Breakouts and Theater Sessions: Day 1

Salesforce Security Roadmap: What’s New and What’s Coming

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 8:30 AM – 9:15 AM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Room 3022

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 1:15 PM – 2:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15)

Unpack the latest security innovations across Salesforce Shield and Security Center. Enhance security for both humans and agents, while getting next-level visibility into access, activity, and more.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Test Your Agents and Deploy with Confidence

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 9:00 AM – 9:20 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater

Test, analyze & optimize performance. Explore a comprehensive testing & deployment strategy using Sandboxes, Agentforce Testing Center, Scale Test, Scale Center & ApexGuru for scalable AI solutions.

Role: Administrator, Developer

Get Started with Agentforce Lifecycle Management and DevOps

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 12:30 PM – 1:15 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15

Hear how IT leaders empower teams to build, test, and ship Agentforce quickly, securely, and at scale with ALM. Discover best practices for products like DevOps Center, Sandboxes, and Agentforce Builder.

Role: Developer, IT Business Leader

Tools to Build, Test and Release Agentforce

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater

Learn how you can build accurate Agentforce agents, run automated tests with Agentforce Testing Center and DevOps Testing, and release with DevOps Center.

Role: Architect, Developer

How Salesforce Builds Agents Securely in Sandboxes

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:00 PM – 1:20 PM PDT | Moscone North, LL, Campground, SF on SF Theater

(Also on Thursday, Oct 16 | 12:15 PM – 1:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15)

Discover agent lifecycle management (ALM) best practices: see how our internal teams use Sandboxes, Agentforce Testing Center, and Agentforce Vibes to securely build, test, and deploy AI agents.

Role: Developer, IT Business Leader

Uplevel Your Data Loss Prevention Strategy

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:30 PM – 1:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Slack and Apps Lab Theater

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 8:30 AM – 8:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater)

Safeguard critical data with Salesforce data loss prevention tools. Learn how to strengthen your security posture faster, detect a broader range of risky activities, and investigate exposures quickly.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Protect Your Data with a Plan B

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 1:45 PM – 2:30 PM PDT |  Moscone West, L3, Room 3018

(Also available to watch on Salesforce+)

In the event your data is lost or corrupted, how will you know and what can you do? Learn how to back up your data, archive inactive records, manage privacy requests, and mask or seed data.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Data Mask and Seed: Securely Build and Innovate Faster

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 9:30 AM – 9:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Theater 19)

Accelerate development with automated data masking and seeding in Sandboxes for faster, safer releases. Discover innovations for building better apps, agents and Data 360 experiences.

Role: Administrator, Developer

Implement Salesforce Shield in 20 Minutes

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater

(Also on Thursday, Oct 16 | 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater)

Unlock the full potential of Salesforce Shield with implementation best practices. We’ll guide you step by step to configure Shield effectively and efficiently, and ensure your data is protected.

Role: Administrator, Architect

Salesforce Security and Privacy in 2026 and Beyond

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 4:15 PM – 5:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7

(Also on Thursday, Oct 16 | 2:45 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 15)

Master trust in the agentic era. Dive into our security and privacy roadmap while learning how we’re bringing the best of Agentforce to key products like Security Center and Privacy Center.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Workshops and Roundtables: Day 1

Learn and Share Security and Compliance Best Practices

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 12:30 PM – 1:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 1

(Also on Thursday, Oct 16 | 11:30 AM – 12:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 5)

Join an expert-guided peer discussion for deep insights into Salesforce security. Exchange strategies for navigating challenges, protecting data, and ensuring resilience. Gain actionable advice.

Role: Administrator, Developer, IT Business Leader

App & Agent Lifecycle (ALM): The Agentic Enterprise Journey

Tuesday, Oct 14 | 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 4

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 11:00 AM – 12:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 3)

Join our expert-led discussions to learn best practices for your app lifecycle management. Hear challenges and solutions from fellow IT professionals in building and governing applications and agents.

Role: Developer, IT Business Leader

Evening: Welcome to Dreamforce!

Unwind and network at the Dreamforce welcome reception from 5:00 p.m.–6:00 p.m. in Dreampark, Trailblazer Forest, and Moscone South for some music, refreshments, fun, and networking. The Platform Team will also be hosting our own Sip & Savor Happy Hour at Local Edition in San Francisco from 5:00-7:00 pm. Feel free to drop by and say hi!

Plan your Dreamforce experience today

With more than 1,500 sessions over three days, maximize your time by creating a schedule that suits your needs.

Build your agenda

Day 2, Wednesday Oct, 15 : Become an Agentic Enterprise

Morning: Keynote and the Campground

Day two starts with a bang at the Agentforce Keynote, where you’ll learn how to turn to vision into reality when it comes to becoming an agentic enterprise. From there, make your way to the Salesforce-on-Salesforce Zone, located in the Campground. Stop by the Platform booth to dive into demos, talk to sponsors, and hear incredible customer stories.

Afternoon: More Sessions, More Learning

The learning continues on Wednesday with the Developer Keynote: Build Your Agentic Enterprise from 2 p.m.–2:50 p.m. PT. Discover new developer tools to build the future of apps with AI and data. Plus, learn how to build your Agentic Enterprise with Agentforce, Data 360, Slack, and the deeply unified Agentforce 360 Platform. Add the Developer Keynote to your agenda or watch on Salesforce+.

Breakouts and Theater Sessions: Day 2

Accelerate Org Compliance with Agentforce

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 9:30 AM – 9:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater

Meet Agentforce in Privacy Center. Effortlessly navigate data privacy regulations by identifying policy gaps, translating them into recommended actions and providing simple remediation.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Supercharge Your Salesforce Security with Agentforce

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 10:30 AM – 10:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater

Introducing your new AI-powered security assistant. Learn how to use Agentforce to quickly assess risks, investigate incidents, and strengthen your security posture — no security expertise required.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader

Navigating SaaS Security: A Panel of Executive Insights

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 11:15 AM – 12:00 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 8

Hear directly about real SaaS security challenges, gaps, and solutions from security leaders. Learn how AI and DevSecOps help transform SaaS into a secure, agile environment.

Role: IT Business Leader

A Playbook for the Compliance Auditor

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone South, LL, Content Pavilion, Stage 1

(Also available to watch on Salesforce+)

Discover how purpose-built solutions empower organizations to master regulatory compliance through streamlined data management, robust audit logs, and enterprise-grade data encryption.

Role: Administrator

Beyond the Basics: Do More to Protect Your Data

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 12:30 PM – 12:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 2:00 PM – 2:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Data Lab Theater)

Strengthen data lifecycle management and protect your data from daily vulnerabilities with Salesforce Backup & Recover (formerly Own Recover) and Salesforce Archive.

Role: Administrator

Drive Adoption and Performance with Event Monitoring

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Agent Lab Theater

Discover how Event Monitoring offers real-time insights to boost product adoption. Learn best practices to track your Salesforce investment, including application performance and user engagement.

Role: Administrator, IT Business Leader, Sales

Intro to Agent and Application Lifecycle Management (ALM)

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 3:00 PM – 3:20 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2000

(Also available to watch on Salesforce+)

Learn Salesforce’s five-stage ALM process for AI-powered agents and apps. Discover our tools to plan, build, test, deploy & observe with governance baked in to reduce risk and accelerate innovation.

Role: Developer, IT Business Leader

Discover the Future of Salesforce Development: Roadmap & Q&A

Wednesday, Oct 15 |3:45 PM – 4:30 PM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7

Also being shown Thursday, Oct 16 | 11:00 AM – 11:45 AM PDT | Metreon AMC, L3, Theatre 7

Explore new tools to enhance your developer experience. Salesforce product managers will share the roadmap for agents, MCP, vibe coding, and answer questions in this interactive session.

Role: Administrator, Developer

Building Agentic Apps Faster with AI-Powered Developer Tools

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 4:15 PM – 5:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L3, Room 3024

Learn how to quickly and effectively build and deploy AI agents on the Agentforce 360 Platform. Hear about the future of creating agentic experiences with AI-powered low-code and pro-code tools.

Role: Developer

Workshops and Roundtables: Day 2

Accelerate ALM with Agentforce Vibes

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 8:00 AM – 9:00 AM PDT |  Moscone West, L2, Room 2010

(Also on Thursday, Oct 16 | 3:00 PM – 4:00 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2012)

Elevate your Application & Agent Lifecycle Management (ALM) with quality and security. Discover how Sandboxes, Agentforce Vibes, and Scale Test empower your developers to build and test quickly.

Role: Developer, IT Business Leader

Data Governance and Compliance in the Age of Agentforce

Wednesday, Oct 15 | 8:00 AM – 9:00 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 7

(Also on Wednesday, Oct 15 | 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Roundtable 6)

Join peers to discuss how to secure and protect your data in the agentic era. Share insights and best practices on data protection and secure development, especially for AI adoption.

Role: Administrator, Architect

Evening: Dreamfest!

The day culminates with the legendary Dreamfest, benefiting UCSF Benioff Children’s Hospitals. Enjoy Metallica at Chase Center or Benson Boone at Bayfront Park.

Day 3, Thursday, Oct 16: The Final Stretch

Morning: Breakfast and the IT Keynote

Start your final day with the Platform Power-Up Breakfast in the Dreamforce Lounges starting at 7:30 a.m. While you’re there, be sure to stop by our “Ask the Experts” booth to get all your questions answered by Salesforce professionals. Then, at 9 a.m. in Moscone West Level 3 Keynote Hall, check out the IT Keynote, “Build and Govern the Agentic Enterprise”,  learn how to build and secure Agentforce and agentic apps on Salesforce with new agent-first DevOps and governance tools.

Add the IT Keynote to your agenda, watch on Salesforce+, or stream on LinkedIn.

Afternoon: Security Keynote and More Learning

After a stop at the Campground and some lunch, be sure to check out our Security Keynote, “Protecting the Agentic Enterprise”, at 1:30 p.m. on Moscone Hall A. You’ll hear from Okta CEO Todd McKinnon and Salesforce’s Chief Trust Officer on how the threat landscape is evolving and how you can protect your agentic enterprise. In addition to the Security Keynote, there are several other Platform sessions to wrap up the final day:

Add the Security Keynote to your agenda or stream on LinkedIn.

Breakouts and Theater Sessions: Day 3

Introducing Security Data Fabric: Unify Signals Across Silos

Thursday, Oct 16 | 11:30 AM – 11:50 AM PDT | Moscone West, L2, Room 2000

(Also available to watch on Salesforce+)

Learn how the new Salesforce security data fabric aggregates and correlates security data, enabling organizations to identify, understand, and respond to security threats more effectively.

Role: Administrator, Architect

Introducing Next-Gen Low-Code Tools for AI Development

Thursday, Oct 16 | 2:30 PM – 2:50 PM PDT | Moscone South, LL, Content Pavilion, Stage 4

(Also available to watch on Salesforce+)

See new AI developer tools and integrations to build smart apps. Learn how to speed up DevOps with Agentforce Vibes and low-code change management tools.

Role: Administrator, Developer

Evening: One Last Hurrah

Head back to the Campground or Trailblazer Forest for any last-minute learning or to revisit your favorite booths. Before you know it, it’s time to exhale and relax. You did it! Travel home safely with a head full of new knowledge and a heart full of inspiration.

See you at Dreamforce 2026!
